facts.claim: Scarlet Lady cruise ship shines brighter. Enjoy upgraded suites, stylish cabanas, modern cocktail spots, spa enhancements & a more modern design.
Your ticket to the sparkling waters of the Caribbean
As our very first ship, Scarlet Lady holds a special place in our seafaring hearts. Come on board and prepare to be entranced by the Caribbean’s unmatchable magic.
Scarlet Lady is a cruise ship owned and operated by Virgin Voyages.
She is the inaugural ship for the cruise line and was delivered on 14 February 2020 by Italian shipbuilder Fincantieri.
In accordance with Virgin Voyages's business model, Scarlet Lady operates exclusively as an "adults-only" ship for guests aged 18 and over.
